subject: English
title: A Triumph of Surgery – Easy Short Notes

key_points: The story is written by James Herriot
Tricki is a pet dog owned by Mrs Pumphrey
Tricki falls ill due to overfeeding and lack of exercise
The narrator is a veterinary surgeon
Tricki is cured through discipline and routine, not surgery
characters: Mrs Pumphrey – A rich and overindulgent owner
The Vet – A practical and kind veterinary surgeon
literary_devices: Irony – The title suggests surgery, but no surgery is performed
Humour – Used to convey a serious message gently
exam_tips: Remember that Tricki is cured without surgery
Focus on the irony of the title
Mention discipline and moderation as the main message
Use examples from the story to support answers
